gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Well-formedness errors for Core IR construction (RFC-0001 §4.3/§4.5 invariants)."] # [derive (Debug , Clone , PartialEq , Eq)] pub enum WfError { # [doc = " The guarantee/bound pairing violates M-I1…M-I4 (the honesty rule)."] GuaranteeBoundMismatch , # [doc = " A bound's numeric payload is out of range (e.g. `delta ∉ [0,1]`)."] MalformedBound , # [doc = " A representation has a non-positive width/dim/trits or an empty VSA model id."] MalformedRepr , # [doc = " A representation declares a dimension above [`repr::MAX_DIM`] — rejected as an"] # [doc = " over-allocation (DoS) guard before any value of that `Repr` is materialized. Names the"] # [doc = " offending field, its declared value, and the cap (never-silent, G2). See"] # [doc = " [`Repr::check_well_formed`](crate::Repr::check_well_formed)."] DimensionTooLarge { # [doc = " The offending dimension field (`\"width\"` / `\"trits\"` / `\"dim\"` / `\"max_active\"`)."] field : & 'static str , # [doc = " The declared (rejected) value."] value : u32 , # [doc = " The enforced upper bound ([`repr::MAX_DIM`])."] cap : u32 , } , # [doc = " A payload does not match its representation (paradigm or length)."] PayloadReprMismatch , # [doc = " A reconstruction manifest violates its schema invariants (RFC-0003 §6;"] # [doc = " `reconstruction-manifest.schema.json`)."] MalformedReconstruction , # [doc = " A measured sparsity observation is out of range (e.g. `density ∉ [0,1]`). Distinct from"] # [doc = " [`WfError::MalformedBound`]: a [`SparsityObs`] is an observation, not a"] # [doc = " guarantee bound (A6-08)."] MalformedSparsity , }
gaps.reason: enum `WfError` variant `DimensionTooLarge` named field(s) `field, value, cap` emitted positionally as `DimensionTooLarge(Bytes, Binary{32}, Binary{32})` — Mycelium's `constructor` is positional-only (no record surface); product structure preserved, field names dropped

gaps.snippet:
impl core :: fmt :: Display for WfError { fn fmt (& self , f : & mut core :: fmt :: Formatter < '_ >) -> core :: fmt :: Result { if let WfError :: DimensionTooLarge { field , value , cap } = self { return write ! (f , "representation dimension '{field}' = {value} exceeds the cap {cap} \
                 (over-allocation guard)") ; } let s = match self { WfError :: GuaranteeBoundMismatch => "guarantee/bound inconsistency (M-I1..M-I4)" , WfError :: MalformedBound => "bound payload out of range" , WfError :: MalformedRepr => { "representation has non-positive width/dim/trits or empty model" } WfError :: PayloadReprMismatch => "payload does not match its representation" , WfError :: MalformedReconstruction => { "reconstruction manifest violates its schema invariants (RFC-0003 §6)" } WfError :: MalformedSparsity => "sparsity observation out of range (density ∉ [0,1])" , WfError :: DimensionTooLarge { .. } => unreachable ! ("handled above") , } ; f . write_str (s) } }
gaps.reason: trait-impl of non-prelude trait `Display` — no ambient trait definition and synthetic trait emission is refused (DN-34 §8.8 / DN-122 MVP); gapped the whole impl so the residual cannot file-poison myc-check (G2; express gap-close 2026-07-16)
